goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west' and should be in the type of 'museum'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee'.
You are also looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should be 'in the same area as the attraction' and should be in the 'expensive' price range.
The restaurant should serve 'european' food.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west and should be in the type of museum
Make sure you get entrance fee
You are also looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the same area as the attraction and should be in the expensive price range
The restaurant should serve european food
Make sure you get address and postcode
